zh.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy是Derby McCarthy和Ellen McCarthy的女兒，於1645年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克登曼瓦。她和Major Phillip O'Sullivan至少有6個兒子。她去世於1693年享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: McCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

variants.name: McArthy
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh, ‘son of Cárthach’. See McCarthy .

variants.name: McCarty
meanings: Irish: variant of McCarthy , reflecting the common southern Irish pronunciation of th.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: The Protestant Lord Protector of England, Oliver Cromwell, landed at Dublin. His troops killed 2,000 men. A great part of lands in Munster, Leinster and Ulster (Drogheda and Wexford) was confiscated and divided among the English soldiers.
Over 6,000 Irish boys and women sold as slaves since England gained control of Jamaica.
William of Orange (William III) lands at Carrickfergus and defeats James II at Battle of the Boyne.
Exclusion of Catholics from Parliament and all professions.

en.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy was born in 1645, in Dunmanway, County Cork, Ireland as the daughter of Derby McCarthy and Ellen McCarthy. She had at least 6 sons with Major Phillip O'Sullivan. She died in 1693, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy est née en 1645, à Dunmanway, County Cork, Irlande, fille de Derby McCarthy et Ellen McCarthy. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Major Phillip O'Sullivan. Elle est décédée en 1693, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy wurde 1645 in Dunmanway, County Cork, Irland, als Tochter von Derby McCarthy und Ellen McCarthy geboren. Sie hatte mit Major Phillip O'Sullivan mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1693 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy è nata il nel 1645 nel Dunmanway, County Cork, Irlanda come figlia di Derby McCarthy e Ellen McCarthy. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Major Phillip O'Sullivan. Morì nel 1693, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthyは1645年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクダンマンワイでDerby McCarthyとEllen McCarthyの娘として生まれた。彼女はMajor Phillip O'Sullivanとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1693年に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy(은)는 1645년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 던먼웨이에서 Derby McCarthy(와)과 Ellen McCarthy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Major Phillip O'Sullivan(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1693년 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy nasceu em 1645, em Dunmanway, County Cork, Irlanda filha de Derby McCarthy e Ellen McCarthy. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Major Phillip O'Sullivan. Ela faleceu em 1693, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy родилась в 1645 г. в местности дунманвеи, коунти корк, Ирландия. Её родителей звали Derby McCarthy и Ellen McCarthy. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Major Phillip O'Sullivan. Она умерла в 1693 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Johanna McCarthy nació en 1645, en Dunmanway, County Cork, Irlanda como hija de Derby McCarthy y Ellen McCarthy. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Major Phillip O'Sullivan. Murió en 1693, a la edad de 48 años.
